items.title: Eventbrite and Vimeo owner Bending Spoons files to go public
items.summary: Bending Spoons say its app caters to a user base of over 500 million monthly active users.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.summary: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
